info.name: MoreTables API
info.description: Full v1 API. Variables: baseUrl; token (guest or staff Bearer); challenge_token (guest OTP flow / staff 2FA); admin_challenge_token + admin_token (admin flow). Mailgun: mailgun_api_key, mailgun_domain, mailgun_endpoint for folder 00. IDs are placeholders.

variable.description: Guest: from auth/start. Staff: from auth/staff/login.
Mailgun private API key (Basic: user api, password = key)

item.name: 00 - Mailgun (direct API)
item.description: Send a test message through Mailgun to confirm DNS and keys before relying on app OTP email (Guest Start). Does not hit MoreTables API.

urlencoded.value: If you receive this, Mailgun outbound works.

request.description: POST /v3/{domain}/messages. Use same domain as MAILGUN_DOMAIN in Laravel.
GuestStartRequest: email required. Response includes challenge_token — copy to collection variable challenge_token.
VerifyChallengeRequest: challenge_token (uuid), code (6 digits), device_name optional (max 100). Copy token from response to variable token.
SocialLoginRequest: id_token required. Optional: device_name, first_name, last_name.
SocialLoginRequest: same as Google — id_token required; optional device_name, first_name, last_name.
StaffLoginRequest: identifier (email or username string) + password. Returns challenge_token.
VerifyChallengeRequest: challenge_token from staff login, code (6 digits), device_name optional.
ResetPasswordRequest: token (from email), email, password + password_confirmation (Laravel Password defaults).
GuestCompleteProfileRequest: first_name, last_name, phone (unique per user). Bearer token from verify-otp.
Use Body > form-data: file + fields per API
